en: For Zion's sake I will not keep silent, and for Jerusalem's sake I will not be quiet, until her righteousness goes forth as brightness, and her salvation as a burning torch.
zh: 為了錫安的緣故我必不緘默， 為了耶路撒冷的緣故我決不靜止， 直到它的公義如光輝發出， 它的救恩像明燈發亮。

en: The nations shall see your righteousness, and all the kings your glory, and you shall be called by a new name that the mouth of the LORD will give.
zh: 列國必看見你的公義， 眾王必看見你的榮耀； 人要給你起一個新名， 是耶和華親口指定的。

en: You shall be a crown of beauty in the hand of the LORD, and a royal diadem in the hand of your God.
zh: 你在耶和華的手中要作美麗的冠冕， 在你 神的掌上要作君王的華冠。

en: You shall no more be termed Forsaken, and your land shall no more be termed Desolate, but you shall be called My Delight Is in Her, and your land Married; for the LORD delights in you, and your land shall be married.
zh: 你必不再稱為被撇棄的， 你的地也必不再稱為荒涼的， 你卻要稱為我所喜悅的， 你的地也要稱為有丈夫的， 因為耶和華喜悅你， 你的地也必有丈夫。

en: For as a young man marries a young woman, so shall your sons marry you, and as the bridegroom rejoices over the bride, so shall your God rejoice over you.
zh: 因為年輕人怎樣娶處女， 那建造你的也必怎樣娶你； 新郎怎樣因新娘歡樂， 你的 神也必怎樣因你歡樂。

en: On your walls, O Jerusalem, I have set watchmen; all the day and all the night they shall never be silent. You who put the LORD in remembrance, take no rest,
zh: 耶路撒冷啊！我在你的城牆上設立了守望的人； 他們晝夜都不緘默； 提耶和華之名的啊！你們不要靜止。

en: and give him no rest until he establishes Jerusalem and makes it a praise in the earth.
zh: 你們也不要讓 神靜止，直至他建立耶路撒冷， 等到他使耶路撒冷在地上成為受人讚美的城。

en: The LORD has sworn by his right hand and by his mighty arm: "I will not again give your grain to be food for your enemies, and foreigners shall not drink your wine for which you have labored;
zh: 耶和華指著自己的右手和他大能的膀臂起誓，說： “我必不再把你的五穀給你的仇敵作食物， 外族人也必不再喝你勞碌所得的新酒；

en: but those who garner it shall eat it and praise the LORD, and those who gather it shall drink it in the courts of my sanctuary."
zh: 唯有那些收割的人可以吃五穀，並且讚美耶和華； 那些收集的人可以在我聖所的院子裡喝新酒。”

en: Go through, go through the gates; prepare the way for the people; build up, build up the highway; clear it of stones; lift up a signal over the peoples.
zh: 你們要經過，要從城門經過， 預備人民的道路； 你們要填高，要填高大道。 要撿去石頭、向萬民豎立旗幟。

en: Behold, the LORD has proclaimed to the end of the earth: Say to the daughter of Zion, "Behold, your salvation comes; behold, his reward is with him, and his recompense before him."
zh: 看哪！耶和華曾向地極的人宣告，說： “你們要對錫安的居民 說： ‘看哪！你的拯救者來到了。 他給予人的賞賜在他那裡，他施予人的報應在他面前。’”

en: And they shall be called The Holy People, The Redeemed of the LORD; and you shall be called Sought Out, A City Not Forsaken.
zh: 人必稱他們為聖潔的子民， 為耶和華買贖回來的人； 你也必稱為被愛慕的，不被遺棄的城。
